title: Workspace Cargo.toml: all zcash/sapling git deps pinned to unlabelled revs with no version tag; future audits have no anchor for what was in scope
notes: 2026-04-26 round-66 check: sapling-crypto 0.7.0 was published to crates.io on 2026-04-21 and its feature definition confirms corez dependency (not core2), so the original reason for the git rev pin at b8a81c22f034d68f9bbd6cba728aab807b9ba2ea no longer applies. This is actionable: replace the git dep with version = '0.7.0' in Cargo.toml and verify the build compiles. Also audit orchard and librustzcash (zcash_address, zcash_primitives, zcash_protocol, zcash_transparent) for clean tagged releases on crates.io to remove the remaining git pins.
close_reason: audit comments added to all pinned git revs with dates and rationale
